Gas Robot Subsystems

Gas Robot is a gas-leak mapping robot, not a full autonomy stack. The docs below follow the architecture you described: raw sensing, state estimation, gas filtering, heat-map mapping, simple patrol navigation, and alerts.

System Flow

hardware_interfaces
  ->
state_estimation
  ->
perception
  ->
mapping
  ->
navigation
  ->
communication
  • Hardware Interfaces
  • State Estimation
  • Perception
  • Mapping
  • Navigation
  • Communication
  • CV Pipeline

Module Roles

Design Intent

This architecture is intentionally narrow:

  • keep the gas sensor path easy to debug

  • separate pose estimation from sensor filtering

  • treat mapping as a gas-intensity field, not classic SLAM

  • keep navigation simple and mission-driven

  • use communication for alerts and operator feedback

Related Documentation

  • Gas Robot Setup - Workspace setup and configuration

  • System Contract - Message interfaces

  • Communication Model - Data flow model
